article.title: Tennessee bans crypto ATMs that have become 'payment portal of choice for scammers' — second state to restrict machines after Indiana
article.summary: Tennessee becomes the second state to ban crypto ATMs after its governor signs a bill into law restricting these machines starting July 1st.
article.title_zh: Tennessee 禁止加密 ATM，這些機器已成為詐騙者的「首選支付入口」— 繼 Indiana 後第二個限制的州
article.summary_zh: Tennessee 州長簽署法案禁止加密 ATM，自 7 月 1 日起生效，成為繼 Indiana 後第二個禁止這類機器的州。

article.title: AI-mad Verizon to continue with cuts after CEO's jobs warning
article.summary: Verizon CEO Dan Schulman has now completed the 13,000 layoffs he promised last November, but more could lie ahead.
article.title_zh: AI 熱衷者 Verizon 在 CEO 警告後將繼續裁員
article.summary_zh: Verizon CEO Dan Schulman 已完成去年 11 月承諾的 13,000 人裁員，但可能還有更多裁員在後。

article.title: Sanctioned Chinese AI Firm SenseTime Releases Image Model Built for Speed
article.summary: With US restrictions limiting its access to advanced tech, SenseTime is doubling down on open source with a new model optimized to run on Chinese-made chips.
article.title_zh: 受制裁中國 AI 公司 SenseTime 發佈速度優化的圖像模型
article.summary_zh: 在美國限制其獲得先進技術的情況下，SenseTime 加倍投入開源，推出針對中國製造芯片優化的新模型。

article.title: Apple to seek tariff refunds, plans to reinvest money in U.S. manufacturing
article.summary: Apple CEO Tim Cook said today that the company is seeking refunds for duties it paid under tariffs Donald Trump announced last year, which the Supreme Court recently ruled unconstitutional. Here are the details. more…
article.title_zh: Apple 將尋求關稅退款，計劃在美國製造業重新投資
article.summary_zh: Apple 首席執行官 Tim Cook 表示，公司正尋求之前支付的關稅退款，這些關稅由川普去年宣布，最近被最高法院裁定違憲。

article.title: Samsung teases ‘AI glasses’ as it warns of the RAM crisis getting even worse in 2027
article.summary: In its latest earnings call, Samsung has teased its upcoming AI glasses, but also painted a pretty bleak picture of the ongoing RAM crisis. more…
article.title_zh: Samsung 預告「AI 眼鏡」，警告 RAM 危機 2027 年將加劇
article.summary_zh: Samsung 在最新財報電話會議中預告了即將推出的 AI 眼鏡，但也指出 RAM 危機將在 2027 年惡化。

article.title: Beijing bans drone sales even as rest of world buys Chinese drones
article.summary: China’s new clampdown on drone sales and even the storage of drone components within the capital of Beijing stands out in a country that effectively built the global market for affordable commercial drones. The unprecedented citywide rules taking effect on May 1 come as authorities tighten drone regulations across the country and enforce flight restrictions more strictly. Chinese officials are refining drone regulations because “enforcement and rules have been uneven or unclear,” said Lizzi C. Lee , a fellow on the Chinese economy at the Asia Society Policy Institute’s Center for China Analysis in New York City. Now it appears that Beijing officials are “experimenting with a more comprehensive, front-end approach” by implementing the citywide ban on drone sales and rentals—not to mention r
article.title_zh: 北京禁止無人機銷售，儘管世界其他地方都在購買中國無人機
article.summary_zh: 中國對北京內無人機銷售甚至無人機組件儲存的新打擊在該國實際上建立了全球經濟型商用無人機市場的背景下尤為突出。於 5 月 1 日生效的前所未有的全市規則是當局無人機管制收緊的表現。

article.title: Victim of AI agent that deleted company's entire database gets their data back — cloud provider recovers critical files and broadens its 48-hour delayed delete policy
article.summary: An SaaS business got all its data back after its cloud data provider recovered critical databases that were ruthlessly wiped by an AI agent gone rogue.
article.title_zh: 遭 AI 代理刪除整個資料庫的受害者取回資料 — 雲端供應商復原關鍵檔案並擴大 48 小時延遲刪除政策
article.summary_zh: SaaS 業務在雲端供應商復原被失控 AI 代理無情清除的關鍵資料庫後，成功取回所有資料。

article.title: Meta's multi-billion-dollar Graviton deal highlights intensifying CPU shortages in AI infrastructure — the industry signals a shift to Agentic inference workloads, pushing demand
article.summary: Meta signed a multibillion-dollar, multi-year deal with Amazon Web Services last week to deploy tens of millions of Graviton5 CPU cores across AWS data centers.
article.title_zh: Meta 的數十億美元 Graviton 交易突顯 AI 基礎設施中 CPU 短缺加劇——業界轉向 Agentic 推理工作負載，推動需求增長
article.summary_zh: Meta 與 Amazon Web Services 簽署了一份數十億美元的多年協議，在 AWS 數據中心部署數千萬個 Graviton5 CPU 核心。

article.title: Google Photos ‘Wardrobe’ digitizes your closet and helps find what to wear
article.summary: Motorola today announced its 2026 flip-style Razr lineup with a new AI-powered Google Photos feature called “Wardrobe.” more…
article.title_zh: Google Photos「衣櫃」功能數位化您的衣櫥並幫助選擇穿著
article.summary_zh: Motorola 今日發表 2026 翻蓋式 Razr 系列，並推出名為「衣櫃」的新 AI 驅動 Google Photos 功能。

article.title: Quick Share AirDrop support expands to more flagship Android phones
article.summary: Credit: Hadlee Simons / Android Authority TL;DR AirDrop-style sharing already works on devices like Pixel 10 and Galaxy S26, and more brands are now joining. OPPO Find X9 Ultra and vivo X300 Ultra are among the first non-Google/Samsung phones to adopt the unified system. Quick Share has been Android’s version of AirDrop for some time, but it really only worked well on Google Pixel or Samsung Galaxy phones. If you used another brand, you probably had to deal with different, incompatible sharing options. This is beginning to change. While AirDrop-style sharing with Quick Share already works on the newest Samsung and Pixel phones, such as the Pixel 10 and Galaxy S26 , other Android brands are starting to support it too.
article.title_zh: Quick Share AirDrop支持擴展到更多安卓旗艦機
article.summary_zh: AirDrop風格的分享已在Pixel 10和Galaxy S26等設備上運作，更多品牌現在加入。OPPO Find X9 Ultra和vivo X300 Ultra是首批採用統一系統的非Google/Samsung手機。

article.title: Cut AI token usage by 96%? Here’s how AWS Strands Agents does it.
article.summary: For this episode of The New Stack Makers , I sat down with AWS developer advocate Morgan Willis to talk about Strands Agents , the company’s open source agentic framework, which has seen over 14 million downloads since it launched just under a year ago. Willis brought a hands-on demo built around a simple accounting API to show what building with Strands looks like in practice. The demo walks through three iterations of the same task: looking up the latest invoice for a customer. First, Willis mapped each API endpoint directly to an agent tool, the way most developers would by default. The agent needed five chained API calls and burned roughly 52,000 tokens. Then she swapped in intent-based tools that are built around an outcome rather than a data operation. With the same query, gett
article.title_zh: 如何通過 AWS Strands Agents 將 AI token 使用量減少 96%?
article.summary_zh: 在本集 The New Stack Makers 節目中,AWS 開發者倡導者 Morgan Willis 分享了 Strands Agents 這款開源代理框架如何在推出不到一年的時間內達到超過 1400 萬次下載,並展示了實際應用演示。

article.title: Securing the Untrusted Agentic Development Layer
article.summary: Join us to learn how to architect a development environment where your builders and their agents can move fast and securely.
article.title_zh: 保護不可信的智慧代理開發層
article.summary_zh: 加入我們以了解如何架構一個開發環境，讓你的團隊和他們的代理能夠快速且安全地運作。

article.title: OpenAI推出進階帳號安全機制，為ChatGPT與Codex導入實體金鑰登入並支援用戶退出模型訓練
article.summary: OpenAI週四（4/30）宣布為ChatGPT及Codex用戶提供支援實體金鑰，關閉以電子郵件和SMS回復帳號、自動將用戶退出模型訓練等確保帳號安全性。OpenAI也宣布最新模型GPT 5.5-Cyber即將開放特定安全廠商存取。
article.title_zh: OpenAI推出進階帳號安全機制，為ChatGPT與Codex導入實體金鑰登入並支援用戶退出模型訓練
article.summary_zh: OpenAI週四（4/30）宣布為ChatGPT及Codex用戶提供支援實體金鑰，關閉以電子郵件和SMS回復帳號、自動將用戶退出模型訓練等確保帳號安全性。OpenAI也宣布最新模型GPT 5.5-Cyber即將開放特定安全廠商存取。

article.title: Homebrew PlayStation DualSense controller adapter for PC can be built for just $20 with a Raspberry Pi Pico — wireless dongle delivers adaptive triggers and haptic feedback to gamers
article.summary: A PC gaming enthusiast has shared a video demo of the new DS5Dongle which unlocks the full gamut of Sony DualSense controller features for Windows users who prefer wireless.
article.title_zh: 自製 PlayStation DualSense PC 控制器轉接器，Raspberry Pi Pico 成本僅 $20 — 無線加密狗為玩家提供觸覺反饋和自適應觸發功能
article.summary_zh: PC 遊戲愛好者分享新 DS5Dongle 視頻演示，為 Windows 用戶解鎖完整 Sony DualSense 控制器功能並支援無線。

article.title: Chinese GPU maker Cambricon's Q1 revenue hits $423 million as country's homegrown AI chip market accelerates — Chinese chipmakers continue to leech market share from Nvidia
article.summary: The results come as Chinese chipmakers continue to absorb market share from Nvidia.
article.title_zh: 中國 GPU 製造商景嘉微第一季收入達 $423 百萬，國內自主 AI 晶片市場加速 — 中國晶片製造商持續從 Nvidia 搶食市場份額
article.summary_zh: 中國晶片製造商持續從 Nvidia 吸收市場份額。

article.title: Netflix launches iPhone app redesign, here’s what’s new
article.summary: Netflix is rolling out an overhaul of its iPhone app today, as previously announced , with a redesign centered around a vertical video feed called ‘Clips.’ Here’s what’s new. more…
article.title_zh: Netflix 推出 iPhone 應用重新設計，新增功能一覽
article.summary_zh: Netflix 於今日推出 iPhone 應用大改版，重點圍繞名為「Clips」的垂直影片動態消息功能展開。
